Source: Einstein GenAI API References
URL: https://developer.salesforce.com/docs/einstein/genai/references
Fetched: 2026-03-19

# Einstein GenAI / Agentforce API References

## Available APIs
- Agent API — Connected app + token-based communication with AI agents
- Models API — Apex classes and REST endpoints for LLM connections
- Testing API — Metadata API and Connect API for agent tests
- Citations API — Apex classes for programmatic citation support

## SDKs
- Agentforce Python SDK — Programmatic agent management via Metadata API
- Agentforce Mobile SDK — Native iOS and Android integration
- Agent Script — Domain-specific language for Agentforce Builder
- Agentforce DX — Pro-code tools for external development
